response:
Hello there, movie lover! I'm thrilled to help you find a hilarious movie to watch!

I understand you're looking for a comedy film from the past 75 years, with a rating above 0.0, and currently available on a streaming platform. I've got just the thing!

Here are three funny movie recommendations that match your criteria:

• The Hangover (2009) - A wild and crazy night in Vegas leads to a missing friend and a whole lot of laughs!
• Superbad (2007) - A coming-of-age comedy about two high school friends trying to score booze for a party.
• Bridesmaids (2011) - A hilarious and heartwarming story about a group of bridesmaids clashing as they prepare for their friend's wedding.

Hope you find something that tickles your funny bone!

**Sources:**
• The Hangover (2009)
• Superbad (2007)
• Bridesmaids (2011)

sources.title: The Hangover
sources.overview: When three friends finally come to after a raucous night of bachelor-party revelry, they find a baby in the closet and a tiger in the bathroom. But they can't seem to locate their best friend, Doug – who's supposed to be tying the knot. Launching a frantic search for Doug, the trio perseveres through a nasty hangover to try to make it to the church on time.

sources.title: Superbad
sources.overview: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-soaked party goes awry.

sources.title: Bridesmaids
sources.overview: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honor. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she’ll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you’ll go for someone you love.
